mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_like (biz_type, biz_id, user_id, operate_type, operate_time) VALUES (#{record.bizType}, #{record.bizId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.operateType}, #{record.operateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE operate_type = #{record.operateType}, operate_time = #{record.operateTime}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_like WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND operate_type = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_like (biz_type, biz_id, user_id, operate_type, operate_time) VALUES
(#{item.bizType}, #{item.bizId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.operateType}, #{item.operateTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE operate_type = VALUES(operate_type), operate_time = VALUES(operate_time)
